name: Cheesecake with Raspberry Sauce - Lite
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle Graham Cracker Currns evenly over bottom of lightly greased 9 inch springform pan.
2. Puree well drained Cottage Cheese in a food processor until smooth.
3. Add Cream Cheese, cut into cubes and continue processing until smooth.
4. With the processor on, gradually add Sugar, Cornstarch, and Vanilla.
5. Add Egg and Egg Whites one at a time to the cream cheese mixture; process using on and off action until just blended.
6. Pour batter into pan.
7. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce temperature to 250°F and bake an additional 35-40 minutes.
8. Cool completely in the pan.
9. Refrigerate overnight.
10. Serve with Raspberry Sauce.
Raspberry Sauce:
1. Drain thawed, frozen Raspberries, reserving juice.
2. Place berries in a sieve; crush to extract additional juice.
3. Discard seeds.
4. Whisk Cornstarch and heated Jelly into Juice.
5. Cook sauce in microwave on High until thickened (1-2 minutes).
6. Refrigerate until cool.
7. Makes 1 1/4 cups.
